MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Feb-10-2009 Vacated

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-10-2009 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Jonathan Bornstein, Esq., appeared for and with plaintiff Get Goo Wong. Thomas E. Drohan, Esq. appeared for and with defendant Jin Quan Luo.

Settlement Conference Held. According to plaintiff's attorney the case has settled. Parties did not reveal to the Court the nature and extent of settlement and simply left the courthouse. Trial date vacated.

Hon William R. Gargano/Judge Pro Tem Dennis Hyde, Clerk Garth Sayers, Not reported. (218)
